What We Do

Innovative Solutions.
Dependable Results.

From structural analysis to fabrication-ready drawings, we combine cutting-edge design methodology with uncompromising resilience standards — across buildings, electrical infrastructure, and industrial facilities.

🏢

Structural Analysis & Design

Full 3D structural modelling and member design for all building types. We perform irregularity checks — drift, torsion, and diaphragm discontinuity — to ensure code-compliant performance under seismic and wind loads.

ETABS STAAD.Pro NSCP
⚡

Electrical Tower & Substation Structures

Design and analysis of transmission towers, communication towers, HV equipment supports, and gantry structures under combined wind and conductor loading, with full 3D detailing in Tekla.

STAAD.Pro IDEA StatiCa Tekla
🏭

Industrial & Warehouse Structures

Long-span steel truss design (up to 30 m), SMRF connections, steel deck, and pressure slab systems for manufacturing and logistics facilities — including pile and isolated footing foundations.

STAAD.Pro AutoCAD Tekla
🏙️

High-Rise & Mixed-Use Buildings

Shearwall and flat slab design for multi-storey commercial and residential towers, including podium-with-tower configurations and foundations under high hydrostatic water pressure.

ETABS SAFE AutoCAD
💧

Non-Building & Special Structures

Structural design of water treatment tanks, elevated water tanks, and fire pump houses under hydrodynamic and hydrostatic loading — with member optimization for long-term durability.

STAAD.Pro IDEA StatiCa
🔩

Steel Connection Design & Detailing

Bolt, weld, and plate verification using IDEA StatiCa, with 3D Tekla models and complete fabrication drawing packages — from assembly drawings to material take-offs.

IDEA StatiCa Tekla Structures AutoCAD
Project Experience

Built on Real
Engineering Experience

A showcase of structural engineering work drawn from the hands-on experience of our engineers.

airport facility Candon city, ilocos sur, ph

Flight Service Station

candon city, ilocos sur, ph

A flight service station with shear wall system designed for wind and seismic loads. Completed ETABS analysis covering member forces, deflection, drift, soft story & stress checks. And complete AutoCAD construction drawings produced. Ensuring safety, stability and code-compliant performance.

ETABS AutoCAD
Commissary & Warehouse Muntinlupa City

Food Commissary & Warehouse Building

Muntinlupa City

A large-scale food commissary with a long-span steel truss roof spanning 24 m. The work involved pedestal column sizing, isolated footing design, drift and torsion irregularity checks, SMRF connection detailing, and full steel beam and deck coordination.

etabs AutoCAD
Energy Infrastructure Philippines

5-Storey Control Building

Philippines

A five-storey Control Building with full structural analysis, member design, and drawing coordination. Structural requirements were carefully integrated within an architecturally driven layout, with all deliverables prepared to construction standard.

ETABS AutoCAD
Energy Infrastructure Zambales

Control Building

Zambales

Structural support design for a large-scale solar farm. Steel framing systems for PV array mounting were designed under wind-critical load combinations, with foundation coordination and constructability review completed for field installation across the site.

etabs AutoCAD
Healthcare Magalanes

Two-Storey Clinic

Magalanes

A two-storey healthcare facility with structural design tailored to medical occupancy requirements. Full analysis under seismic and wind loads, with member sizing and foundation design completed to meet code requirements for essential facilities.

etabs AutoCAD
Healthcare · High-Rise Philippines

Hospital — 20 Floors + Roof Deck

Philippines

A 20-storey hospital tower with a roof deck, requiring rigorous irregularity management across drift, torsion, and diaphragm discontinuity. Scope included shearwall and column design, isolated foundation sizing, and complete beam design across all floors.

ETABS AutoCAD
Confidential Project
Industrial Warehouse Philippines

Industrial Warehouse

Philippines

A heavy-duty industrial warehouse with a 30 m clear-span steel truss roof, driven pile foundations, and pressure slab design. SMRF connections were verified in detail, with steel beam and deck systems designed throughout and full irregularity compliance achieved.

etabs IDEA StatiCa AutoCAD
Confidential Project
Mixed-Use Tower Complex Philippines

Podium with Twin Towers (21F & 26F)

Philippines

A podium-with-tower development featuring two residential towers of 21 and 26 floors. Foundation design addressed high hydrostatic water pressure at basement level. Full shearwall, column, beam, and flat slab design was performed with comprehensive irregularity compliance.

ETABS SAFE AutoCAD
Confidential Project
air transport facility Philippines

Passenger Terminal Building

Philippines

A public transport terminal with a complex curved roof geometry, designed under wind and seismic load combinations. Full ETABS analysis covered member force, deflection, and stress evaluation, with optimized member sizing and AutoCAD construction drawings delivered.

ETABS AutoCAD
Confidential Project
Warehouse Building Philippines

Warehouse Building

Philippines

A single-storey warehouse structure fully analyzed under wind and seismic conditions. Steel connections were verified using IDEA StatiCa and fabrication-ready drawings produced in AutoCAD, with member sizes optimized for structural efficiency and material economy.

STAAD.Pro IDEA StatiCa AutoCAD
Confidential Project
Residential Building Philippines

Residential Building

Philippines

A multi-storey residential structure fully analyzed under seismic and wind load combinations. Member forces, deflections, and stresses were evaluated against code limits, with optimized member sizing and complete AutoCAD construction drawings produced.

STAAD.Pro AutoCAD
Confidential Project

About D & A

Precision-Driven.
Built to Last.

D & A Engineering Consulting is a newly established structural engineering consultancy founded with a single purpose — to deliver innovative, resilient, and sustainable structural solutions that set the benchmark for engineering excellence.

Our founders bring over 15 years of hands-on structural engineering experience across buildings, electrical infrastructure, and industrial facilities in the Philippines — and that depth of expertise is now fully committed to every D & A engagement.

We are building this firm on the same principles that guide our vision: technical integrity, structural resilience, and a commitment to designs that stand the test of time. Every project — regardless of size — receives our full attention and professional best.

What We Stand For

Our core values are not separate from our vision — they are how we live it, in every project and every decision.

🎯
Engineering Excellence Rigorous analysis, code-compliant design, and precise detailing — no shortcuts, no compromises.
🛡️
Structural Resilience We design structures that perform safely and reliably under real-world conditions — seismic, wind, and beyond.
💡
Innovation Applying the latest tools and methods to deliver smarter, more efficient structural solutions.
🌱
Sustainability Optimised designs that reduce material waste and contribute to a more responsible built environment.
🤝
Integrity Honest, transparent, and professional — in our work, our communication, and our commitments.
Our Direction

Vision & Mission

Vision

Globally Recognized. Locally Grounded.

To be a globally recognized structural engineering firm—delivering leading-edge design excellence and structural resilience that set the international benchmark for innovation, sustainability, and engineering integrity.

Mission

Excellence in Every Structure.

To provide exceptional structural engineering services that combine cutting-edge design methodology with uncompromising resilience standards — creating structures that are both innovative and dependable, while maintaining the highest level of professional excellence and client satisfaction.
